The **University of Madras** (now known as **University of Chennai**) was the first in India to introduce **M.Lib. (Master of Library Science)** and **M.Phil. (Master of Philosophy)** courses in the early 20th century, establishing itself as a pioneer in library and advanced research education. While other universities later adopted similar programs, Madras took the lead in formalizing these degrees. The options do not specify exact years, but historical records
